title: HEAD TEACHER'S MESSAGE
name: SSERUYANGE MATHIAS
message_preview: A school that offers holistic and quality primary education in Uganda. Our children excel in National exams with only first grades and we are proud of this.Not only that but also our pupils are equipped with skills in swimming, ball games, athletics, home economics, debate, and computer knowledge.
image_alt: Portrait of Head Teacher DDUMBA ALLAN
